reason: The statement applies because the text describes King Ahasuerus hosting feasts and banquets for various officials and individuals, including his princes, servants, nobles, and even all the people present in Shushan the palace. The text also mentions Queen Vashti hosting a feast for the women in the royal house. Additionally, the text describes Esther hosting banquets for the king and Haman, showcasing the tradition of hosting prominent individuals in the palace.
